ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the branch */,
  "branch_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the branch */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Email address for the branch */,
  "branch_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the branch */,
  "branch_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the branch (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the branch is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales manager */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the manager works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sales manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "manager_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_managers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer service manager */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the manager works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer service manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer service manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer service manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "manager_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_managers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area manager */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the manager works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the area manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the area manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the area manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "manager_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_managers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations_departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operations department */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the department operates */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the operations department */,
  "dept_email" TEXT /* Email address of the operations department */,
  "dept_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operations department */,
  "dept_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_departments_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_departments_dept_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_manager_id") REFERENCES department_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, customer service manager, area manager, operations department) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the interaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., inquiry, complaint, support request) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "interaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer for the interaction */,
  "customer_service_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer service manager who handled the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_service_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_service_manager_id") REFERENCES customer_service_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales activity */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the activity occurred */,
  "sales_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales manager handling the activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., lead, quote, sale) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale or quote */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the sales activity (e.g., online, in-person, phone) */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., referral, advertisement, direct) */,
  "expected_close_date" TEXT /* Expected date of closing the sale */,
  "actual_close_date" TEXT /* Actual date of closing the sale (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_activities_sales_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_manager_id") REFERENCES sales_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_activities_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area activity */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the activity occurred */,
  "area_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area manager coordinating the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., meeting, training, inspection) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the activity */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "participants" TEXT /* List of participants in the activity */,
  "activity_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_activities_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_activities_area_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_manager_id") REFERENCES area_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operations task */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the task occurred */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operations department handling the task */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., inventory, maintenance, shipment) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the task */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "task_assigned_to" TEXT /* Person or team assigned to the task */,
  "task_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_tasks_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES operations_departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_tasks_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department manager */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operations department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department manager */,
  "manager_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "manager_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
